description: Official-first chemical compliance knowledge pack for RAG demo. Source texts are concise, attributable summaries and rule-oriented excerpts built from public official sources for demonstration, not final legal advice.

sources.title: OSHA HCS 2024 SDS and Appendix D Official Summary
sources.license_note: Public official OSHA source summarized for demo retrieval. Not a substitute for the official Federal Register text.

sources.title: ECHA Candidate List SVHC Official Summary
sources.license_note: Public ECHA candidate list page summarized for demo retrieval. Verify current list directly with ECHA before business use.

sources.title: EPA TSCA Inventory Official Access Summary
sources.license_note: Public EPA TSCA Inventory access guidance summarized for demo retrieval. Confirm active/inactive status with EPA systems before business use.

sources.title: 企业化工物料准入内部禁忌与红线规则
sources.license_note: 合成企业内部演示规则。生产环境应由企业 EHS、法规和业务负责人批准后导入。
